overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character walking through a desert shantytown on the outskirts of Night City, climbing an industrial water tower, and observing the city skyline from the top. The environment features abandoned vehicles, rusted industrial infrastructure, and a stark contrast between the impoverished desert settlement and the gleaming corporate towers visible in the distance.

events.description: beginning of clip showing desert settlement environment with abandoned cars
approaching red barrier gates marking entrance to industrial zone

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the desert shantytown past abandoned vehicles and wooden shacks

notable_agents.action: woman standing near green abandoned car wearing shorts and red boots

entered.detail: rusted green sedan with broken windows
derelict pickup truck with missing wheels
small corrugated metal building with sloped roof
desert yucca tree with spiky branches
weathered wooden post fence enclosing property

segments.scene_description: The player walks through a sun-blasted desert shantytown on the outskirts of Night City. An NPC stands near an abandoned green car while the camera passes rusted vehicles and wooden shacks. The ground is dry dirt with sparse desert vegetation, and red rock formations rise in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial facility entrance with electrical infrastructure

events.description: passing through red and white barriers into fenced industrial compound
approaching metal stairs leading up to industrial platform

agents.ego_description: walking through the industrial gate and approaching the metal stairs of the facility

entered.detail: large rusted metal pipes running vertically along the structure
concrete and metal staircase leading up to platform
tall metal pylon with multiple crossbars and cables
metal fence topped with barbed wire surrounding the facility

segments.scene_description: The player enters an industrial compound through red barriers, leaving the shantytown behind. Large rusted pipes and electrical towers dominate the scene. The camera approaches a metal staircase leading up to an elevated platform, with chain-link fencing visible on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: vertical industrial tower with maintenance ladder

events.description: beginning ascent up yellow metal ladder attached to water tower
reaching the top platform and exiting the ladder

agents.ego_description: climbing the yellow maintenance ladder up the side of the industrial water tower

entered.detail: bright yellow metal maintenance ladder with safety rails
large cylindrical industrial tank with rust and graffiti
grated metal walkway with railings around the tower

segments.scene_description: The player ascends a bright yellow ladder attached to a massive industrial water tower. The view shifts from ground level to elevated as the camera climbs past metal scaffolding and grated platforms. The city skyline becomes visible in the distance between the tower structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated industrial platform overlooking city and desert

events.description: emerging onto rooftop platform with panoramic view of Night City skyline
panning camera to survey the shantytown and desert landscape below

agents.ego_description: standing on the tower platform and looking around at the panoramic view of the city and surrounding desert

entered.detail: large parabolic communication antenna on the platform
distant futuristic metropolis with towering skyscrapers and neon billboards
bird's eye view of the desert settlement with scattered shacks and roads

segments.scene_description: From the top of the industrial tower, the player surveys a breathtaking panoramic view. The satellite dish stands prominently on the platform while the camera pans across the stark contrast between the impoverished desert shantytown below and the gleaming corporate towers of Night City rising in the distance. Highway overpasses and industrial ruins dot the landscape between the two zones.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the dusty depths of a desert shantytown to a high-altitude vantage point overlooking a futuristic metropolis. It begins by moving through a sun-blasted settlement of wooden shacks and rusted vehicles set against red rock formations, before passing through red barriers into an industrial compound filled with massive pipes and electrical towers. As the camera reaches a metal staircase, the perspective shifts upward while ascending a bright yellow ladder, climbing past scaffolding and grated platforms as the distant city skyline begins to emerge. The scene finally opens into a breathtaking panoramic view from the top of a water tower, where the camera pans from a prominent satellite dish across the stark contrast between the impoverished ruins below and the gleaming corporate towers of Night City.
